text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation in these spaces—the glass-enclosed room exudes quiet focus, as if knowledge is being negotiated or collaboratively discovered, while the vibrant R+D wall immerses me in a world where creative potential is celebrated. I am both observer and participant, aware of the quiet hum of possibility. The surroundings invite reflection, both on the work being done here and my own place within these evolving ideas.
